title: Respawnable Pets
description: A simple mod that allows your pets to respawn after death when you next sleep using a new item, the Etheric Gem.
body:
Respawnable Pets

Allows your pets to respawn after death when you next sleep using a new item, the Etheric Gem.

Toggling respawn status is done via interacting [Use Item/Place Block] with a pet. You can also set multiple pets in a 9x3x9 area to respawn by sneak using the Etheric Gem. The Etheric Gem only works on pets you own, and entities in the `respawnablepets:cannot_respawn` are excluded. **Recipe** ![Recipe](https://github.com/MoriyaShiine/respawnable-pets/blob/main/.webassets/recipe.png?raw=true)
